IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: MARLYTHURST UNIVERSITY IS A CATHOLIC LIBERAL ARTS UNIVERSITY PROVIDING HIGHER EDUCATION THROUGH BOTH ON-CAMPUS AND ON-LINE EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS. THE UNIVERSITY CLOSED AS OF DECEMBER 31, 2018 AND IS IN THE PROCESS OF DISSOLVING.
IRS990.MissionDesc: MARYTHURST UNIVERSTY IS A CATHOLIC LIBERAL ARTS UNIVERSITY NATIONALLY RECOGNIZED FOR ITS DEDICATION TO EXCELLENCE IN THE EDUCATION OF SELF-DIRECTED ADULT LEARNERS SEEKING RELEVANT, RIGOROUS AND INNOVATIVEUNDERGRADUATE AND GRADUATE PROGRAMS.THE UNIVERSITY OFFERED ITS LAST CLASSES SUMMER TERM 2018, AND ALL EMPLOYEES OF THE UNIVERSITY HAVE MOVED ON AS OF DECEMBER 31. THE UNIVERSITY CLOSED AS OF DECEMBER 31, 2018.
IRS990.Desc: HIGHER EDUCATION STUDENT POPULATION: 146 UNDERGRADUATE STUDENTS AND 556 GRADUATE STUDENTS. HIGHER EDUCATION DEGREES GRANTED: 57 BACHELOR DEGREES AND 89 GRADUATE DEGREES. THE UNIVERSITY CLOSED AS OF DECEMBER 31, 2018. WITH OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE'S APPROVAL THE UNIVERISTY TRANSFERRED FUNDS TO VARIOUS PUBLIC CHARITIES PER ORIGINAL DONORS DIRECTIONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE MARYLHURST UNIVERSITY BOARD OF TRUSTEES ANNOUNCED IN MAY 2018 THAT THE UNIVERSITY WOULD CLOSE BY DECEMBER 31, 2018. THE UNIVERISTY GRANTED FUNDS TO VARIOUS PUBLIC CHARITIES PER THE ORIGINAL DONORS DIRECTIONS.
MARYLHURST UNIVERSITY RUNS A DISPLAY ADVERTISEMENT IN THE PORTLAND TRIBUNE EACH SPRING IN CONJUNCTION WITH THE RECRUITMENT FOR THE UPCOMING ACADEMIC YEAR.
THE UNIVERSITY RECEIVES STUDENT FINANCIAL AID FROM STATE AND FEDERAL AGENCIES.
THE UNIVERSITY PAYS MEMBERSHIP DUES TO THE UNIVERSITY CLUB OF PORTLAND

THE UNIVERSITY HAS STRONG POLICIES AND PROCEDURES ESTABLISHED IN THE UNIVERSITY ACCOUNTING DEPARTMENT AND A DEVELOPED PROCUREMENT POLICY. ALTHOUGH THERE ISN'T SPENDING POLICY WHICH ADDRESSES PAYMENT OF SOCIAL CLUB DUES FOR ITS OFFICERS, THERE ARE POLICIES AND PROCEDURES FOR ENSURING THAT EXPENDITURES ARE INCURRED FOR BUSINESS PURPOSES, THE MEMBERSHIP FEES ARE FOR BUSINESS AND THUS WERE PROPERLY AUTHORIZED AND PROCESSED IN THE UNIVERSITY ACCOUNTING DEPARTMENT.
MELODY ROSE RECEIVED A SEVERANCE PAYMENT OF $306,875.

BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY AT SAN BERNARDINO
ROMAN CATHOLIC DIOCESEHOLY FAMILY CATHOLIC SCHOOL OF BOISE
SISTERS OF THE HOLY NAMES OF JESUS AND MARY
THE JOE AND FRANCES NAUMES FAMILY FOUNDATION
SISTERS OF THE HOLY NAMES OF JESUS AND MARY

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE UNIVERSITY OFFERED ITS LAST CLASSES SUMMER TERM 2018, AND THE UNIVERSITY CLOSED AS OF DECEMBER 31, 2018. THE ORGANIZATION IS IN THE PROCESS OF DISSOLVING. ALL RESTRICTED ASSETS HAVE BEEN TRANSFERRED TO OTHER TAX EXEMPT ORGANZIATIONS IN ACCORDANCE WITH DONORS' INSTRUCTIONS AS WELL AS OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE'S APPROVAL.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 8B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THERE ARE NO COMMITTES WITH AUTHORITY TO ACT ON BEHALF OF THE GOVERNING BODY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE BOARD CHAIR REVIEWS THE FORM 990 AFTER BEING PREPARED BY THE EXTERNAL CPA FIRM. THE FINAL FORM 990 IS MADE AVAILABLE TO ALL MEMBERS OF THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES AFTER FILING THE RETURN WITH THE IRS. THE FORM 990 IS ELECTRONICALLY FILED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: KEY EMPLOYEES, OFFICERS AND TRUSTEES ANNUALLY REVIEW AND SIGN THE UNIVERSITY'S CONFLICT OF INTEREST DISCLOSURE FORM. THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IS MADE AWARE OF ANY CONFLICTS OF INTEREST. THOSE WITH CONFLICTS OF INTEREST ARE TO REFRAIN FROM PARTICIPATING IN CONSIDERATION OF PROPOSED TRANSACTIONS UNLESS THE BOARD OR ADMINISTRATION REQUESTS INFORMATION OR INTERPRETATION, TRUSTEES OR OFFICERS WITH CONFLICTS SHALL NOT VOTE. AT THE REQUEST OF THE BOARD CHAIR, THE COVERED PERSON WITH A CONFLICT MAY BE ASKED TO LEAVE THE MEETING DURING DISCUSSION AND/OR VOTE. HUMAN RESOURCES AND THE PRESIDENT'S OFFICE MONITOR FOR COMPLIANCE

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PRESIDENT'S COMPENSATION IS REVIEWED AND DETERMINED BY BOARD OF TRUSTEES BASED ON COMPARABLES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: WHILE TAX LAWS DO NOT MANDATE THAT THE UNIVERSITY'S GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS BE MADE AVAILABLE FOR PUBLIC INSPECTION, THE UNIVERSITY MAKES THESE DOCUMENTS AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.
CONTRACTORS: PROGRAM SERVICE EXPENSES 402,834. MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL EXPENSES 255,614. FUNDRAISING EXPENSES 3,440. TOTAL EXPENSES 661,888.
RESTRICTED ASSETS TRANSFERRED TO OTHER TAX EXEMPT ORGANIZATIONS -23,758,401.
